name: Closing the Lab-to-Store Gap: A Data-Efficient Post-Training and Experience-Driven Learning VLA Framework for Retail Humanoids

description: arXiv:2607.20345v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Closing the gap between benchmark performance and reliable real-world operation remains a central challenge for Vision-Language-Action (VLA) humanoid robots, which must handle execution errors, distribution shifts, and environmental variability. author: Roger Sala Sis\'o, Tiago Silv\'erio, Jakob Sand, Tran Nguyen Le
